name: Asparagus Roll Ups
recipeIngredient: 4 oz bread (loaf), crusts removed and each slice flattened
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the blue cheese, Worcestershire sauce, beaten egg, cream cheese, garlic powder, and pepper until well combined.
2. Spread the mixture onto the prepared bread slices.
3. Place an asparagus spear on top of each slice.
4. Roll up the bread tightly around the asparagus.
5. Drizzle with melted butter.
6. Cut each roll into thirds.
7. Place the rolls on a cookie sheet.
8. Bake for about 20 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
